commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: check conf-sanity/32 with -q
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: check conf-sanity/32 with -q

trying to reducing time spent in conf-sanity/32 running locally.

devices=$(do_rpc_nodes $node $LCTL device_list | wc -l)
here devices seems to be 2 always due to debugging lines do_rpc_nodes
prints.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly env=ONLY=32 testlist=conf-sanity
Test-Parameters: fortestonly env=ONLY=32 testlist=conf-sanity
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: If821ef36b5c15ec9aa264c4ceec312bd676cc302
